title: Margherita Pizza
steps: Preheat oven to 250C (480F) with a pizza stone or steel inside, for at least 45 minutes.
Stretch the dough into a 12-inch round on a floured surface.
Spread crushed tomatoes evenly, leaving a 1-inch border for the crust.
Distribute torn mozzarella over the sauce.
Slide onto the hot stone and bake 8-12 minutes until the crust is blistered and cheese is bubbling.
Remove, top with fresh basil leaves, drizzle with olive oil, and finish with a pinch of salt.

title: Butter Chicken
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt, garam masala, garlic, and ginger for at least 1 hour.
Sear marinated chicken in a hot pan until browned, then set aside.
Melt butter in the same pan, add tomato puree, and simmer 10 minutes.
Blend the sauce smooth, return to heat, and stir in cream.
Add chicken back in and simmer 15 minutes until cooked through.
Finish with a knob of butter and serve with rice or naan.

title: Pad Thai
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water until pliable, about 20 minutes.
Whisk tamarind paste, fish sauce, and palm sugar into a sauce.
Stir-fry shrimp or tofu in a hot wok until just cooked, push to one side.
Scramble eggs in the cleared space, then mix everything together.
Add drained noodles and sauce, toss until noodles are coated and tender.
Add bean sprouts, toss briefly, and top with crushed peanuts.

title: Caesar Salad
steps: Whisk mayonnaise, anchovy, garlic, and lemon juice into a dressing.
Toss chopped romaine with the dressing until evenly coated.
Add croutons and half the parmesan, toss again.
Plate and top with remaining parmesan.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: Cream butter with both sugars until light and fluffy.
Beat in eggs one at a time.
Mix in flour and baking soda until just combined.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Scoop onto a lined baking sheet and bake at 190C (375F) for 9-11 minutes.
Cool on the sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a rack.

title: Chicken Biryani
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt, biryani masala, and half the fried onions for 2 hours.
Parboil basmati rice until 70% cooked, then drain.
Cook marinated chicken in a heavy pot until nearly done.
Layer parboiled rice over the chicken, top with remaining fried onions and saffron milk.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat (dum) for 25-30 minutes.
Rest 10 minutes, then gently fluff and serve.
